tasks.label: Build Granite4 Micro (Debug)
tasks.command: cmake -B build -A ARM64; cmake --build build --config Debug --target granite4_micro -j32

tasks.label: Build and Run Granite4 Micro (Release)
tasks.command: cmake -B build -A ARM64; cmake --build build --config Release --target granite4_micro -j32; .\build\bin\Release\granite4_micro.exe

tasks.label: Build Phi3-5 AIHub (Debug)
tasks.command: cmake -B build -A ARM64; cmake --build build --config Debug --target phi3_5_aihub -j32

tasks.label: Build and Run Phi3-5 AIHub (Release)
tasks.command: cmake -B build -A ARM64; cmake --build build --config Release --target phi3_5_aihub -j32; .\build\bin\Release\phi3_5_aihub.exe

tasks.label: Build Phi4 (Debug)
tasks.command: cmake -B build -A ARM64; cmake --build build --config Debug --target phi4 -j32

tasks.label: Build and Run Phi4 (Release)
tasks.command: cmake -B build -A ARM64; cmake --build build --config Release --target phi4 -j32; .\build\bin\Release\phi4.exe

tasks.command: cmake -B build -A ARM64; cmake --build build --config Release --target qwen3_4b_aihub -j32; .\build\bin\Release\qwen3_4b_aihub.exe

tasks.label: Build Qwen2-Omni (Debug)
tasks.command: cmake -B build -A ARM64 -DGENIEX_BUILD_VLM=ON; cmake --build build --config Debug --target qwen2_omni -j32

tasks.label: Build and Run Qwen2-Omni (Release)
tasks.command: cmake -B build -A ARM64 -DGENIEX_BUILD_VLM=ON; cmake --build build --config Release --target qwen2_omni -j32; .\build\bin\Release\qwen2_omni.exe
